positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a steaming cup of coffee and a croissant, presented on a rustic wooden table. The scene has a strong, graphic silhouette style reminiscent of vintage Scandinavian mid-century modern design. Use a limited color palette of deep navy, burnt orange, creams, and earthy browns. The composition must be highly central, clean, and designed to wrap around a garment. The drawing should feature crisp lines, flat planes of color, and exaggerated joyful movement, capturing the warmth of a sunny morning. Minimal background detail to keep the focus on the objects and their interaction, optimized for T-shirt printing, vector art quality, high contrast.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, dirty, messy, blur, low resolution, noise, grain, artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, realistic photography, photorealism
